meaning: 防抖：连续触发时只在安静一段时间后执行一次
example: Use debounce for search input so requests wait until typing pauses.

meaning: 幂等：同一操作执行多次，结果仍然等同于执行一次
example: Retry-safe APIs should make write operations idempotent.

meaning: 竞态条件：结果依赖多个异步操作不可控的完成顺序
example: Cancel stale requests to avoid race conditions in UI state.

meaning: 记忆化：缓存函数结果，避免重复计算
example: Memoization helps when the same expensive computation repeats.

meaning: 背压：下游处理不过来时，让上游减速或排队
example: Streams use backpressure to avoid unbounded memory growth.
